suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add speculative decoding implementation details: NgramCache trie structure, EagleDraftHead reuse of lm_head weights, draft-verify loop algorithm
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both ngram-lookahead and eagle-draft-head features implemented comprehensive speculative decoding infrastructure

keyFindings: NgramCache class with trie-based n-gram indexing
Greedy equivalence verified: output identical to standard decode when drafts rejected
EagleDraftHead reuses lm_head weights for draft generation
eagle_speculative_decode() function implements EAGLE draft-verify loop
Greedy equivalence verified: output identical to standard decode
VAL-SPEC-003 passed (output identical to standard decode)
Temperature sampling acceptance rate is 0% (MH acceptance not implemented - non-blocking)
